page_content:
INST779 Readings Seminar (1 Credit)

Readings in emerging topics. Through readings and discussion the class will critically assess future directions and highlight intersection points with other disciplines (e.g., medicine) and sub-disciplines of information studies and computer science (e.g., information retrieval, computer vision, machine learning). One or more themes will be covered over

the semester (e.g., inclusive design, health informatics, environmental sustainability, social networking) and will be chosen based on instructor and student interest.

Restriction: Permission of INFO-College of Information Studies. Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.
